bible.title: Oink Oink Lost: Seaside Snuffles

setting.name: Tiny Seaside Village
setting.description: A cozy little village by the sea, with salty air, sandy paths, and cheerful cottages.

player.description: A small baby pig with a round snout and a very curious walk.

bible.narratorIntro: Piglet is gently lost in a tiny seaside village. Three friendly neighbors have little clues to help Piglet find Mama Pig.

buildings.name: Seashell Cottage
buildings.exteriorDescription: A small blue cottage with shell buttons by the door.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside are tidy chairs, a teapot, and a basket of knitted scarves.

buildings.name: Harbor Bakery
buildings.exteriorDescription: A warm bakery with a chalkboard sign and flower pots out front.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside there are shiny trays, sweet smells, and a cheerful pie counter.

buildings.name: Net Mender Shed
buildings.exteriorDescription: A neat wooden shed with nets hanging on pegs and a tiny bench.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside are coiled ropes, mended nets, and little jars of string.

buildings.name: Pearl Post
buildings.exteriorDescription: A small post office with a pearl-painted door and a bell by the step.

buildings.name: Seabreeze Market
buildings.exteriorDescription: A lively market stall with striped cloth and baskets of fruit.

npcs.name: Mina
npcs.appearance: A fluffy seagull with a yellow scarf and a tidy beak.
npcs.personality: Kind, brisk, and proud of her neat little cottage.

lines.greeting: Hello, little pig! I saw Mama waddling about.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Seashell Cottage.
lines.idle: I like shiny shells and tidy things.

npcs.name: Bram
npcs.appearance: A smiling otter with a floury nose and rolled-up sleeves.
npcs.personality: Bouncy, helpful, and always thinking about snacks.

lines.greeting: Oh, hello! I can help with a clue.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Net Mender Shed.

npcs.name: Lulu
npcs.appearance: A gray cat with a red apron and a string tied around one paw.
npcs.personality: Quiet, clever, and very good at noticing where things go.

lines.greeting: Purrfect timing. I remember something helpful.
lines.hint: I am sure Mama did not stop at Pearl Post.
lines.idle: I keep my strings very tidy.

hints.text: I am sure Mama did not stop at Seashell Cottage.
I am sure Mama did not stop at Net Mender Shed.
I am sure Mama did not stop at Pearl Post.

candidateLocations.name: Seashell Cottage
candidateLocations.description: A cozy cottage with shell buttons and a tidy porch.

clueFacts.object: with a basket of knitted scarves

candidateLocations.name: Harbor Bakery
candidateLocations.description: A warm bakery with sweet treats and a happy pie counter.

candidateLocations.name: Net Mender Shed
candidateLocations.description: A neat shed for fixing fishing nets and hanging rope.

candidateLocations.name: Pearl Post
candidateLocations.description: A little post office with a bell and a pearl-painted door.

clueFacts.attribute: that smells like ink and paper
clueFacts.object: with a bell by the step

bible.reunionLine: Mama Pig is at the Harbor Bakery! Piglet nuzzles Mama and gets a happy snuggle.
bible.verification: Each clue rules out one wrong place; only Harbor Bakery remains.
